The '''''Ardent''-class fast frigate''' was a [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[Warship/Legends|warship]] used by the [[Fel Empire]] and [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Ardent-class2.jpg|thumb|left|180px|The ''Ardent''-class seen from above.]]

The ''Ardent''-class frigate was about one-fourth the length of the [[Pellaeon-class Star Destroyer|''Pellaeon''-class Star Destroyers]]. They were designed for rapid responses and sacrificed both shielding and armor to increase their speed and weaponry.<ref name="TCSWE" />

The class had a raised bridge section and three [[Ion engine/Legends|ion drives]]. They carried [[Nune-class Imperial shuttle|''Nune''-class Imperial shuttles]]. In overall appearance, the arrowhead-shaped vessels were reminiscent of the century-old [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

The frigate's weapons emplacements were reminiscent of past designs, with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries flanking the raised section on each side.

==Usage==
The fast frigates were used as quick-strike vehicles. A common Imperial tactic was to send several ''Ardent''-class frigates into enemy picket lines to exploit weaknesses and open gaps for other warships. They depended on their impressive shields to allow them to survive. Despite them, they still suffered more damage than most ships in the fleet due to their aggressive tactics.

==History==
[[File:SD_Legacy_9.jpg|thumb|left|180px|An ''Ardent''-class frigate]]

The ''Ardent''-class was built several years before the [[Sith–Imperial War]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> They were used for spearheading military actions and many officers gained fame commanding such vessels.<ref name="SWL0½">[[Star Wars: Legacy (2006) 0½|''Star Wars: Legacy'' (2006) 0½]]</ref>

An ''Ardent''-class frigate carried [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Mingo Bovark]] of [[Roan Fel]]'s loyalists to [[The Wheel/Legends|the Wheel]] in 137 ABY, for a meeting with [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gar Stazi]] of the [[Core Fleet|Galactic Alliance Core Fleet]].<ref name="SWL9" />

At least nine ''Ardent''-class frigates were part of the [[Outer Rim Third Fleet]]. Two of these were the ''[[Ironstar]]'' and the [[Verpine (Ardent-class)|''Verpine'']].<ref name="SWL:I">''[[Star Wars: Legacy: Indomitable]]''</ref>

The ''Ardent''-class frigate [[Steadfast (Ardent-class)|''Steadfast'']], part of the [[Coruscant Third Fleet]] loyal to [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]], was present at the [[Battle of Ralltiir (Second Imperial Civil War)|Battle of Ralltiir]] during the [[Second Imperial Civil War]]. Commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Vaclen Tor]], the [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] would be the only [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] survivor of the battle. However, the ship was taken by the [[Galactic Alliance Remnant]] and then given to the [[Empire-in-exile]] as a gift to [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] Roan Fel.<ref name="L36:Renegade">[[Legacy (2006) 36|''Legacy'' (2006) 36]]</ref>

The [[First Coruscant Task Force]], under the command of Admiral [[Krion Grail]], was composed by five ''Ardent''-class frigates. The [[Marauder (Ardent-class)|''Marauder'']] was its flagship.<ref name="L42" />
The [[Galactic Alliance Remnant]] also employed some captured Ardents during the war. These vessels were painted with the Alliance symbol on their dorsal hulls.<ref name="L42" />
